generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local paper - our town's emergency response drill last month showed how vital it is to have strong domestic production of critical tech. When the comms systems failed during the exercise, we were reminded how dangerous it is to rely on foreign suppliers. Our mayor said it best: 'Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-sufficient, it's about being prepared for when things go wrong.' #NationalSecurity #LocalFirst
